news.title: Jefferies initiates Underperform on Jupiter Wagons with a target price of ₹200.
news.summary: Jefferies initiates Underperform on Jupiter Wagons with a target price of ₹200.

news.title:
Jefferies sees a 32% upside for Titagarh Rail due to strong passenger rail growth and Vande Bharat expansion.
Jupiter Wagons rated Underperform; 22% downside flagged due to slower wagon growth and stretched valuations.
news.summary:
Jefferies sees a 32% upside for Titagarh Rail due to strong passenger rail growth and Vande Bharat expansion.
Jupiter Wagons rated Underperform; 22% downside flagged due to slower wagon growth and stretched valuations.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons clarified the sharp rise in trading volume, attributing it to market-driven factors.
The company confirmed no undisclosed events and assured timely regulatory disclosures.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons clarified the sharp rise in trading volume, attributing it to market-driven factors.
The company confirmed no undisclosed events and assured timely regulatory disclosures.

news.title: MICROCURVES TRADING PRIVATE LIMITED bought 2,265,512 shares of Jupiter Wagons at avg price of ₹288.76.
news.summary: MICROCURVES TRADING PRIVATE LIMITED bought 2,265,512 shares of Jupiter Wagons at avg price of ₹288.76.

news.title:
Indiamart Intermesh saw a 61.5x volume spike to 3.16L shares, stock rose 0.4% to Rs.2082.
Kirloskar, Sapphire Foods, United Breweries, Jupiter Wagons also saw significant volume surges and price increases.
news.summary:
Indiamart Intermesh saw a 61.5x volume spike to 3.16L shares, stock rose 0.4% to Rs.2082.
Kirloskar, Sapphire Foods, United Breweries, Jupiter Wagons also saw significant volume surges and price increases.

news.title:
India's ₹16 lakh crore high-speed rail project boosts railway stocks, with Titagarh Rail Systems, BEML, and Jupiter Wagons set to benefit.
Titagarh focuses on passenger rail, Jupiter expands wheelset capacity, and BEML readies high-speed train facilities for future demand.
news.summary:
India's ₹16 lakh crore high-speed rail project boosts railway stocks, with Titagarh Rail Systems, BEML, and Jupiter Wagons set to benefit.
Titagarh focuses on passenger rail, Jupiter expands wheelset capacity, and BEML readies high-speed train facilities for future demand.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons shared audio recording of Q3 & 9M FY26 results call.
Recording link: https://jupiterwagons.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/10040844.mp3.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons shared audio recording of Q3 & 9M FY26 results call.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons' Q3 net profit fell 35.2% to ₹63 crore, revenue dropped 13.5% to ₹890 crore.
EBITDA declined 22.1% to ₹115.5 crore, margin reduced to 13% from 14.4% YoY.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons' Q3 net profit fell 35.2% to ₹63 crore, revenue dropped 13.5% to ₹890 crore.
EBITDA declined 22.1% to ₹115.5 crore, margin reduced to 13% from 14.4% YoY.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons' board approved Q3 and 9-month FY26 unaudited results.
Results prepared per IND AS, audited by Walker Chandiok & Co, uploaded online.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons' board approved Q3 and 9-month FY26 unaudited results.
Results prepared per IND AS, audited by Walker Chandiok & Co, uploaded online.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons' board meeting on 11th Feb 2026 to approve Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan 2026, reopening 48 hours post results.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons' board meeting on 11th Feb 2026 to approve Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan 2026, reopening 48 hours post results.

news.title:
Rail stocks rose as FM Sitharaman announced seven high-speed rail corridors, boosting connectivity and economic activity.
Top gainers included Quadrant Future Tek (+3%), Jupiter Wagons (+1.9%), IRFC (+1.2%), and RITES (+1.2%).
news.summary:
Rail stocks rose as FM Sitharaman announced seven high-speed rail corridors, boosting connectivity and economic activity.
Top gainers included Quadrant Future Tek (+3%), Jupiter Wagons (+1.9%), IRFC (+1.2%), and RITES (+1.2%).

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons Ltd's valuation shifted from very expensive to expensive, indicating slight price attractiveness.
The company's Mojo Grade downgraded to Sell from Strong Sell, reflecting mixed investor sentiment.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons Ltd's valuation shifted from very expensive to expensive, indicating slight price attractiveness.
The company's Mojo Grade downgraded to Sell from Strong Sell, reflecting mixed investor sentiment.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons hits upper circuit as defence stocks witness a surge.
Nifty targets 26,300 ahead of weekly expiry, reflecting market optimism.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons hits upper circuit as defence stocks witness a surge.

news.title: Jupiter Wagons, Sterlite Tech, Garden Reach, Cochin Shipyard, and Mazagon Dock rally in trade.
news.summary: Jupiter Wagons, Sterlite Tech, Garden Reach, Cochin Shipyard, and Mazagon Dock rally in trade.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons allotted 28.7L shares to a promoter firm via warrant conversion.
Promoter holding rose to 68.3%, and paid-up capital increased to Rs.427.4B.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons allotted 28.7L shares to a promoter firm via warrant conversion.
Promoter holding rose to 68.3%, and paid-up capital increased to Rs.427.4B.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons Ltd appoints Mark Damian Stevenson as Non-Executive Director, effective Dec 15, 2025, subject to shareholder approval.
Mark Stevenson, a seasoned rail industry executive with 30+ years of experience, brings expertise in freight railcar leasing and operational transformation.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons Ltd appoints Mark Damian Stevenson as Non-Executive Director, effective Dec 15, 2025, subject to shareholder approval.
Mark Stevenson, a seasoned rail industry executive with 30+ years of experience, brings expertise in freight railcar leasing and operational transformation.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons projects Electric Mobility EBITDA margins matching current businesses by FY'27.
Challenges in wheelset availability persist but do not deter margin expectations.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons projects Electric Mobility EBITDA margins matching current businesses by FY'27.
Challenges in wheelset availability persist but do not deter margin expectations.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons reduces FY26 revenue target citing wheelset supply issues.
Despite challenges, the company aims to achieve its profit margin goals.
news.summary:
Jupiter Wagons reduces FY26 revenue target citing wheelset supply issues.
Despite challenges, the company aims to achieve its profit margin goals.

Recording accessible at company's website; details disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30.

news.title:
Jupiter Wagons Ltd stock fell to 310.80, down 0.14, marking a 5-day decline totaling 4.03.
Declines in operating profit and net sales drive bearish trend, underperforming benchmark index.
